name: Colossal Pina Colada (Virgin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except ice cubes and mint, in a blender container.
2. Blend on high speed until frothy.
3. Pour into 6 tall glasses filled with ice cubes.
4. Garnish with mint sprigs if desired.
5. For thicker consistency, omit ice cubes. Freeze the pineapple juice in ice-cube trays, blend these cubes with the other ingredients, and garnish with mint.
